page.humanSummary: A person reads this single spec as a styled web page with stable sections.
page.agentSummary: An AI coding agent reads this JSON artifact directly and follows exact fields.

body.goal: Show the required shape for one ContextKit spec document.
body.problem: Free-form documents drift in structure and visual treatment.

architecture.summary: Structured JSON stores the document contract; the fixed ContextKit page derives indexes and renders a selected style template.

contracts.name: Single document source
rules: Pages render with the shared ContextKit layout.

agentInstructions: Read this JSON before changing the related implementation.
reviewChecklist: The document describes exactly one spec.
